The '''asyr''' was a [[Flower/Legends|flower]] with a pleasant scent found on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]],<ref name="GCG" /> a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> that was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> Some Bothan [[Gender/Legends|females]] had "Asyr" as a given name, with "Azira" being an alternate spelling of the name.<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The asyr was mentioned in the [[2003]] reference book ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]] and published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GCG" />
